title: equisetum ramosissimum f. simplex
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum f. simplex is a type of plant that belongs to the horsetail family, specifically a subspecies of Equisetum ramosissimum, characterized by its simple or unbranched stems. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum f. simplex include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve bone health, and support kidney function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used as a powder or capsule supplement.
